items.value: The evidence provided does not include any specific details or examples that demonstrate the behavior of the scenario 'Scope downgrade on token refresh'. Without concrete evidence of how this scenario is implemented or validated, it is impossible to confirm whether the expected result is met. The prior steps indicate gaps in the validation of discount types and other requirements, which further complicates the ability to assess this exploratory step.
